name: Impossible Taco Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Chopped Green Chilies (4 Oz), drained
1 cup Monterey Jack or Cheddar Cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch quiche dish or pie plate measuring 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. Cook and stir the beef and onion over medium heat until the beef is brown; drain.
4. Stir in the seasoning mix.
5. Spread the mixture in the plate and sprinkle with chilies.
6. Beat milk, baking mix, and eggs together until smooth (15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute with a hand beater).
7. Pour the mixture into the plate.
8. Bake for 25 minutes.
9. Top with tomatoes and sprinkle with cheese.
10. Bake until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean, about 8 to 10 more minutes.
11. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
12. Serve with sour cream, chopped tomatoes, and shredded lettuce if desired.
6 to 8 servings
